top_articles.title: Palo Alto Networks firewall zero-day exploited for nearly a month
top_articles.summary: Palo Alto Networks warned customers that suspected state-sponsored hackers have been exploiting a critical-severity PAN-OS firewall zero-day vulnerability for nearly a month.

top_articles.title: CISA: Critical Infrastructure Must Master Isolation, Recovery
top_articles.summary: The agency has issued guidance to help critical infrastructure operators prepare for cyberattacks by foreign threat actors.

top_articles.title: Oracle Debuts Monthly Critical Security Patch Updates
top_articles.summary: Containing fixes for critical-severity vulnerabilities, the monthly rollouts will focus on addressing priority issues faster.

top_articles.title: Palo Alto Networks to Patch Zero-Day Exploited to Hack Firewalls
top_articles.summary: CVE-2026-0300 affects the Captive Portal service of PAN-OS software on PA and VM series firewalls.

top_articles.title: Palo Alto Networks warns of firewall RCE zero-day exploited in attacks
top_articles.summary: Palo Alto Networks warned customers today that a critical-severity unpatched vulnerability in the PAN-OS User-ID Authentication Portal is being exploited in attacks.
